notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Edouard Julien out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Beck pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Beck challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Jordan Beck walks.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Kyle Hart picks off Jordan Beck at 2nd on throw to second baseman Jake Cronenworth.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman singles on a line drive to left fielder Ramón Laureano. Brenton Doyle scores.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Beck pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Beck singles on a line drive to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Hunter Goodman scores. Tyler Freeman to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Jackson Merrill scores. Manny Machado scores.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Jackson Merrill scores. Manny Machado scores.
